name: Neck (Sternocleidomastoid & Cervical Extensors)

landmarks.notes: Direct neck training is niche; use very light loads, slow tempo, and pain-free ranges. Volume needs are low. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: Tolerates 2-3x/week of low-load direct work if trained at all.
recovery_notes: Cervical spine is sensitive — introduce gradually and never train into pain.
training_notes: Train flexion and extension (and optionally lateral flexion) with a harness or plate. Optional for most lifters; relevant for contact-sport athletes.
